title: Tanzania Sisal Corporation (Acquisition of Shares) (No. 2) Order, 1968
title_en: Tanzania Sisal Corporation (Acquisition of Shares) (No. 2) Order, 1968

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the Tanzania Sisal Corporation (Acquisition of Shares) (No. 2) Order.

It is hereby declared that all the shares in the companies specified in the Schedule hereto and which were not vested in the Corporation by virtue of the provisions of section 19 of the Tanzania Sisal Corporation (Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act 1 shall vest in the Tanzania Sisal Corporation with effect from the 31st December, 1968. 1 Cap. 55 Schedule Muhinduru Sisal Estate (1964) Limited. Mdaula Estate Limited. Bombuera Limited. Kimamba Fibres Limited. Manzabay Sisal Estate (1963) Limited.
